query:
SELECT 
  pr.id,
  pr.month,
  pr.cost,
  pr.payment_status,
  pr.post_date,
  c.name as channelName
FROM purchase_records pr
JOIN channels c ON pr.channel_id = c.id
WHERE c.name LIKE '%идеальный%'
ORDER BY pr.month DESC, pr.id DESC
LIMIT 30;
